channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The GOP's Cover-Up and Political Distrust in Modern America
item.description: The article critiques the Republican Party's alleged cover-ups and the erosion of public trust in political institutions. It highlights how figures like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have become sy...

item.title: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, Close Trump Ally, Dies at 71
item.description: Lindsey Graham, a U.S. Republican senator and close ally of former President Donald Trump, has died at the age of 71 following a brief illness. His office confirmed his passing on social media, statin...

item.title: Katie George: Sportscaster's Career, Marriage, and Achievements
item.description: Katie George is a renowned American sportscaster known for her versatility in covering multiple sports like college football, Formula 1, NBA, and volleyball. Born on December 3, 1993, in Louisville, K...

item.title: Nancy Mace Considers Running for Lindsey Graham's Senate Seat
item.description: The sudden death of South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham has opened a Senate seat that Rep. Nancy Mace (R-SC) is reportedly considering for a potential run. A source close to Mace told The Hill repor...

item.title: Manmohan Singh's Response to Election Commission Criticism During 2012 Elections
item.description: Former Chief Election Commissioner SY Quraishi recounted a tense meeting with former Prime Minister Manmohan Singh in 2012, where Singh expressed deep concern over ministers' comments about the Electi...

item.title: Congress Aims to Shift Ayodhya Narrative Amid Temple Donation Controversy
item.description: The Indian National Congress is intensifying its campaign against the management of the Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust, accusing the BJP-RSS of misusing funds and controlling the temple administ...

item.title: Canadian Challenges: Housing, Bureaucracy, and Public Dissatisfaction
item.description: The article compiles reader letters criticizing Canada's political and social issues. Contributors discuss Prime Minister Mark Carney's housing policies, including plans to address the 24 Sussex Drive...

item.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake Review: A Nostalgic Update with Modern Graphics
item.description: Ubisoft's *Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced* has been released 13 years after its original 2013 launch, leveraging advancements in graphics and gameplay. The remake, set in the Caribbean during th...

item.title: S. Janaki's enduring legacy in Kerala through music and family bonds
item.description: The article chronicles the profound impact of singer S. Janaki on Abhilash Pudukad's family in Kerala, highlighting how her music became an integral part of their lives. Abhilash, who grew up surround...

item.title: AI's Role in Transforming South Africa's Higher Education System
item.description: The article explores how artificial intelligence is poised to revolutionize higher education in South Africa by addressing systemic challenges such as the skills gap and the temporal mismatch between ...

item.title: A Family Letter Reflecting on Life and Legacy
item.description: The article presents a heartfelt letter from Barua Ndefu, a family member, reflecting on the importance of family bonds, legacy, and personal growth. It emphasizes the role of family in shaping indivi...

item.title: Physician Suggests Frequent Flights May Have Contributed to Lindsey Graham’s Sudden Death
item.description: Primary care physician Marc Siegel proposed a potential link between Senator Lindsey Graham's frequent international travel and his sudden cardiac arrest. The article details how Graham, known for his...

item.title: Iraqi PM to Discuss Strategic Ties and Energy Cooperation with U.S.
item.description: Iraq’s Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi is set to visit Washington, D.C., on Monday to strengthen strategic partnerships with the United States, focusing on economic collaboration, trade agreements, and en...

item.title: Asian-Canadians and Jewish Community Forge Solidarity Against Antisemitism
item.description: After a Montreal synagogue was firebombed in June 2026, a coalition of Asian communities—including Cambodian, Chinese, Vietnamese, and Filipino groups—united to denounce antisemitism and support the J...

item.title: Jimmy Alapag Returns to Philippine Basketball After NBA Stint
item.description: Jimmy Alapag, a former NBA player, has decided to return to the Philippines after his stint in the United States. The article details his career trajectory, including his time in the NBA and his decis...

item.title: Nigeria Extends Condolences to Qatar Following Former Emir Sheikh Hamad's Passing
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria has expressed deep sorrow over the death of Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, the former Emir of Qatar, who passed away on July 12, 2026. In a statement by the Minis...

item.title: Yosemite Ventures Expands Biotech Portfolio with Focus on Epigenetic Editing and Non-Invasive Cancer Therapies
item.description: The article discusses Yosemite Ventures' strategic investments in biotechnology, highlighting two key companies: Tune Therapeutics and Histosonics. Tune Therapeutics is developing epigenetic editing t...

item.title: Philippines Expands Mental Health Support in Schools with New Counselor Associates
item.description: The Philippines faces a severe shortage of licensed guidance counselors, with only around 4,000 available as of 2022. This gap has raised concerns about students' mental health and safety, especially ...

item.title: NDLEA Arrests Woman With 5.75kg Heroin Hidden In Luggage At Abuja Airport
item.description: The National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) arrested a 38-year-old South African woman at Abuja's Nnamdi Azikiwe International Airport after discovering 5.75kg of heroin concealed in her luggage....

item.title: EPRA Announces July Electricity Charges, Raising Power Bills for Kenyans
item.description: The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) has announced new electricity charges for July 2026, which will significantly increase power bills for Kenyans. The adjustments come amid rising fu...
